case_title: ROBERT HAUSER VS. BENJAMIN ARTHUR WILSON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2011 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY HAUSER, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, BENJAMIN ARTHUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAUSER, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, BENJAMIN ARTHUR $4,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,450.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
